texto: Unfortunately, wisdom and happiness are old enemies, and where one can be found, the other seldom lingers. - Wolloff
explicacao: Citação de Joseph R. Lallo sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “Unfortunately, wisdom and happiness are old enemies, and where one can be found, the other seldom…” articula sabedoria, happiness, unfortunately em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como sabedoria.

frase_original: Unfortunately, wisdom and happiness are old enemies, and where one can be found, the other seldom lingers. - Wolloff

texto: Many people believe they know true darkness, but until it has been experienced it cannot be imagined. Without even a flicker of light, the mind begins to play tricks. There is a constant feeling that there is a wall before you, that you must stop. The eyes open as wide as they can, hungry for light. The only thing that helps is to shut them tight.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Joseph R. Lallo sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Many people believe they know true darkness, but until it has been experienced it cannot be imagi…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, darkness, fear, útil em momentos de reflexao-noturna e fear.

frase_original: Many people believe they know true darkness, but until it has been experienced it cannot be imagined. Without even a flicker of light, the mind begins to play tricks. There is a constant feeling that there is a wall before you, that you must stop. The eyes open as wide as they can, hungry for light. The only thing that helps is to shut them tight.
